## Skills by Category

### Next.js

- **next-best-practices** – Vercel Next.js patterns — RSC, data fetching, metadata, error handling
- **nextjs-16-complete-guide** – Next.js 16 features, migration from v15, Turbopack, Cache Components
- **optimized-nextjs-typescript** – TypeScript + Next.js — performance, security, clean architecture
- **nextjs-app-router-patterns** – Next.js App Router — Server Components, streaming, parallel routes, Server Actions, data fetching

### Monorepo & pnpm

- **monorepo-management** – Turborepo, Nx, and pnpm workspaces for scalable multi-package repos
- **pnpm** – pnpm workspace setup, catalog, CLI commands, CI configuration

### Database & ORM

- **drizzle** – Complete Drizzle ORM documentation — schema, queries, migrations, integrations
- **neon-postgres** – Neon Serverless Postgres — connection methods, RLS, branching, CLI

### Infrastructure & Logging

- **pino-logging-setup** – Structured logging with Pino — pretty dev output, JSON production, redaction, transports

### Validation & Forms

- **form-builder** – Build accessible forms with React Hook Form + Zod
- **zod** – Zod validation — schema definition, type inference, transforms, error handling

### UI

- **accessibility** – WCAG compliance & a11y patterns
- **shadcn-ui** – shadcn/ui components — Radix UI + Tailwind CSS, theming, forms, charts (developer-kit)
- **shadcn-ui-stitch** – Google Labs shadcn/ui — MCP tools, component discovery, blocks, customization
- **tailwind-v4-shadcn** – Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui — @theme inline, CSS variables, dark mode, component composition
- **framer-motion-animator** – Framer Motion animations — page transitions, gestures, scroll-based animations, micro-interactions
- **frontend-builder** – Modern React/Next.js frontend builder — stack selection, component patterns, UI/UX implementation
- **react-patterns** – React 19 patterns — Server Components, Actions, use() hook, Suspense, React Compiler, concurrent features
- **tailwind-css-patterns** – Tailwind CSS utility-first styling — responsive design, flexbox, grid, typography, colors
- **tailwindcss-advanced-layouts** – Tailwind CSS advanced layout techniques — CSS Grid and Flexbox patterns
- **tailwindcss-animations** – Tailwind CSS animations and transitions — built-in utilities, custom animation patterns
- **tanstack-query-best-practices** – TanStack Query (React Query) — data fetching, caching, mutations, server state management
- **ui-design-system** – UI design system toolkit — design tokens, component docs, responsive calculations, developer handoff

### Testing

- **react-testing-patterns** – React component/hook testing — Testing Library, MSW, jest-axe, async patterns, Vitest
- **vitest** – Vitest testing framework — config, CLI, mocking, coverage, snapshots, concurrency, type testing

### Tools & Meta

- **create-rule** – Create Cursor rules for persistent AI guidance and project conventions
- **find-skills** – Discover and install agent skills from the open ecosystem
- **typescript-advanced-types** – Advanced TypeScript type system — generics, conditional, mapped, template literals

### Security (ClawSec)

- **claw-release** – Release automation for ClawSec suite
- **clawsec-clawhub-checker** – ClawHub reputation checker with VirusTotal Code Insight
- **clawsec-feed** – Security advisory feed with automated NVD CVE polling
- **clawsec-suite** – ClawSec suite manager with advisory-feed monitoring and signature verification
- **clawtributor** – Community incident reporting for AI agents
- **openclaw-audit-watchdog** – Automated daily security audits with email reporting
- **prompt-agent** – Security audit enforcement and prompt security analysis
- **soul-guardian** – Drift detection + baseline integrity guard for agent workspace files

### Authentication (Better Auth)

- **better-auth-best-practices** – Better Auth core best practices — setup, configuration, Drizzle adapter, framework integration
- **organization-best-practices** – Better Auth organization plugin — multi-tenancy, teams, roles, invitations
- **email-and-password-best-practices** – Better Auth email/password — sign-up, sign-in, password reset, email verification
- **better-auth-security-best-practices** – Better Auth security — rate limiting, CSRF, session management, trusted origins
- **two-factor-authentication-best-practices** – Better Auth 2FA — TOTP, backup codes, enforcement, recovery flows
